name: vulk
description: Build, edit, deploy, and manage full-stack web applications from Gemini CLI — powered by VULK's AI generation platform with 16+ LLM models.

settings.name: API Key
settings.description: Your VULK API key (starts with vk_sk_). Get one at https://vulk.dev/settings/api-keys

settings.name: API Base URL
settings.description: VULK API base URL. Only change if using a self-hosted instance.
